description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, featuring a smooth, polished wood grain with a slightly curved butt. The receiver and bolt assembly are metallic, with visible iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower section, with a protruding bolt handle on the right side. The barrel is slender and extends well beyond the stock, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. The overall design is utilitarian, reflecting a traditional military or hunting rifle aesthetic.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long steel barrel, and iron sights. The design is classic and utilitarian, with visible metallic components and a polished wood finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the full wooden stock.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the barrel, stock, and the magazine area.
